title: Drug dosing in chronic kidney disease
key_recommendations: Metformin contraindicated when eGFR < 30; dose reduce 50% if eGFR 30-45.
Apixaban 5 mg BID standard; 2.5 mg BID if 2 of: age >=80, weight <=60 kg, Cr >=1.5.
Avoid NSAIDs in eGFR < 30; minimize in eGFR < 60.
Digoxin highly renally cleared - dose by lean body weight and renal function; risk of toxicity.
Always re-check renal function before prescribing or dose-adjusting in elderly or recently hospitalized patients.
